description: Animated flight path between two cities — camera follows the route tip across the map. Best for trade routes, military movements, data transfers, flight connections.

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Headline above the map, e.g. 'WEAPONS TRANSFER ROUTE' or 'SUPPLY LINE'
fields.ARC_FROM: Origin city key (uppercase): LOS_ANGELES, NEW_YORK, LONDON, PARIS, DUBAI, TOKYO, BEIJING, MOSCOW, SYDNEY, SAO_PAULO, SINGAPORE, WASHINGTON_DC
fields.ARC_TO: Destination city key (uppercase): same options as ARC_FROM
fields.CONTEXT_TEXT: Short supporting sentence shown at end, e.g. 'Shipments routed via third-party intermediaries'
fields.STAT_VALUE_1: Key figure shown at destination, e.g. '$4.2B' or '340 flights'
fields.LABEL_1: Label for stat, e.g. 'TOTAL VALUE' or 'MONTHLY VOLUME'
